[{"id":2,"partnerId":"6799531","partnercode":"BSI0524","productcode":"SPKTAMBSI","productname":"SmartProtection Mitraguna BSI","policynumber":"CL 2024 085","productdescription":"Memberikan Perlindungan Pembiayaan dengan Asuransi Berjangka Menurun bagi Pihak Yang Diasuransikan apabila terjadi risiko meninggal dunia karena sebab alami dan/atau Penyakit dan/atau Kecelakaan.","productexcellence":"
  • Usia Pertanggungan Maksimum sampai dengan 70 Tahun
  • Kontribusi terjangkau dengan perlindungan maksimal
  • Proses yang simple dan mudah (Submission, Refund, Claim)
  • Dukungan dan pengalaman kapabilitas yang dimiliki Allianz
","productbenefit":"
  • Meninggal Dunia:

    • Membayar Santunan Asuransi Manfaat Meninggal Dunia menurun mengikuti sisa pembiayaan pokok + margin bulan berjalan maksimal 1 bulan (jika ada) sejak Pihak Yang Diasuransikan meninggal atau maksimum sebesar Nilai Fasilitas Pembiayaan Awal kepada Bank, jika Pihak Yang Diasuransikan meninggal dunia karena sakit dan/atau kecelakaan.

    Santunan Asuransi Meninggal Dunia yang dibayarkan adalah mengikuti Tabel Penurunan Santunan Asuransi Manfaat Meninggal Dunia dari Allianz Syariah.

  • Manfaat Atribusi (*pilihan):

    • Membayar Santunan Asuransi Manfaat Atribusi menurun mengikuti sisa Atribusi (jika ada) setelah Pihak Yang Diasuransikan meninggal atau maksimum sebesar Atribusi awal kepada Bank, jika Pihak Yang Diasuransikan meninggal dunia karena sakit dan/atau kecelakaan.

    Santunan Asuransi Atribusi yang dibayarkan adalah mengikuti Tabel Penurunan Santunan Asuransi Manfaat Atribusi dari Allianz Syariah.

    Santunan Asuransi tidak termasuk tunggakan dan/atau margin/denda yang timbul dari tunggakan.

    *Atribusi adalah biaya yang diamortisasikan selama jangka waktu pembiayaan. Biaya atribusi yang menjadi nilai perlindungan asuransi adalah biaya yang menjadi beban nasabah pembiayaan baik yang dibayar di muka oleh nasabah pembiayaan maupun yang diberikan talangan oleh Bank, termasuk namun tidak terbatas pada Kontribusi, serta penalti.

","termandcondition":"
  • Usia Masuk Pihak yang Diasuransikan : 18 - 69 Tahun (Ulang tahun terakhir).
  • Masa Asuransi: 1 Bulan - 180 Bulan
  • Maksimum Usia Perlindungan: 70 tahun
  • Nilai Fasilitas Pembiayaan Awal: Rp 5 Juta - Rp 1.5 Miliar
  • Mata Uang: Rupiah
  • Cara Pembayaran Kontribusi: Sekaligus.
  • Masa Tunggu: 30 hari sejak tanggal mulai berlakunya asuransi untuk seorang Pihak Yang Diasuransikan, kecuali Pihak Yang Diasuransikan meninggal akibat kecelakaan.
  • Kontribusi: Kontribusi Tunggal
  • Tidak ada Perbedaan tarif kontribusi untuk Pria & Wanita

request.description:
## Endpoint Description

This endpoint allows users to calculate insurance premiums based on specific input parameters. It processes the provided details and returns relevant information regarding the insurance policy, including premium rates and other related attributes.

### Request Parameters

The request must be sent as a JSON object in the body with the following parameters:

- **partnerCode** (string): The code representing the partner.
    
- **productCode** (string): The code identifying the specific insurance product.
    
- **gender** (string): The gender of the insured individual (e.g., "M" for male, "F" for female).
    
- **dob** (string): The date of birth of the insured individual in YYYY-MM-DD format.
    
- **effectiveDate** (string): The date when the insurance coverage becomes effective in YYYY-MM-DD format.
    
- **maturityDate** (string): The date when the insurance policy matures in YYYY-MM-DD format.
    
- **sumAssured** (integer): The total amount assured under the policy.
    
- **standardPremiFlag** (string): A flag indicating if standard premium applies (e.g., "Y" or "N").
    
- **penaltyFlag** (string): A flag indicating if a penalty applies (e.g., "Y" or "N").
    
- **notaryFlag** (string): A flag indicating if notary services are required (e.g., "Y" or "N").
    
- **generalInsuranceFlag** (string): A flag indicating if the policy is a general insurance (e.g., "Y" or "N").
    
- **penaltyAmount** (integer): The amount of penalty applicable.
    
- **notaryAmount** (integer): The amount charged for notary services.
    
- **extraPremiumRate** (integer): The additional premium rate applicable.
    

### Response Structure

Upon successful execution, the API will return a JSON object containing the following fields:

- **totalSumAssured** (string): The total sum assured after calculations.
    
- **referenceNo** (string): A unique reference number for the transaction.
    
- **premiumRateAttribution** (integer): The attribution rate for the premium.
    
- **premiumRate** (integer): The calculated premium rate.
    
- **discount** (integer): Any applicable discount.
    
- **totalPremium** (string): The total premium amount.
    
- **memberStatus** (string): The status of the member.
    
- **remark** (string): Any additional remarks related to the request.
    
- **extraPremiumAttribution** (string): Attribution for any extra premium.
    
- **attributionSumAssured** (string): The sum assured attributed.
    
- **extraPremiRate** (integer): The rate for any extra premium.
    
- **statusDescription** (string): A description of the current status.
    
- **statusId** (string): An identifier for the status.
    
- **healthQuestionFlag** (string): A flag indicating if health questions are required.
    
- **premiumAttribution** (string): Attribution for the premium.
    
- **entryAge** (integer): The entry age of the insured individual.
    
- **standardPremium** (integer): The standard premium amount.
    
- **extraPremium** (string): Any extra premium amount.
    
- **tenure** (integer): The tenure of the insurance policy.
    

This information is essential for understanding the outcome of the insurance premium calculation based on the provided input parameters.

request.description:
## Endpoint Description

This endpoint allows users to calculate insurance premiums based on specific input parameters. It processes the provided details and returns relevant information regarding the insurance policy, including premium rates and other related attributes.

### Request Parameters

The request must be sent as a JSON object in the body with the following parameters:

- **partnerCode** (string): The code representing the partner.
    
- **productCode** (string): The code identifying the specific insurance product.
    
- **gender** (string): The gender of the insured individual (e.g., "M" for male, "F" for female).
    
- **dob** (string): The date of birth of the insured individual in YYYY-MM-DD format.
    
- **effectiveDate** (string): The date when the insurance coverage becomes effective in YYYY-MM-DD format.
    
- **maturityDate** (string): The date when the insurance policy matures in YYYY-MM-DD format.
    
- **sumAssured** (integer): The total amount assured under the policy.
    
- **standardPremiFlag** (string): A flag indicating if standard premium applies (e.g., "Y" or "N").
    
- **penaltyFlag** (string): A flag indicating if a penalty applies (e.g., "Y" or "N").
    
- **notaryFlag** (string): A flag indicating if notary services are required (e.g., "Y" or "N").
    
- **generalInsuranceFlag** (string): A flag indicating if the policy is a general insurance (e.g., "Y" or "N").
    
- **penaltyAmount** (integer): The amount of penalty applicable.
    
- **notaryAmount** (integer): The amount charged for notary services.
    
- **extraPremiumRate** (integer): The additional premium rate applicable.
    

### Response Structure

Upon successful execution, the API will return a JSON object containing the following fields:

- **totalSumAssured** (string): The total sum assured after calculations.
    
- **referenceNo** (string): A unique reference number for the transaction.
    
- **premiumRateAttribution** (integer): The attribution rate for the premium.
    
- **premiumRate** (integer): The calculated premium rate.
    
- **discount** (integer): Any applicable discount.
    
- **totalPremium** (string): The total premium amount.
    
- **memberStatus** (string): The status of the member.
    
- **remark** (string): Any additional remarks related to the request.
    
- **extraPremiumAttribution** (string): Attribution for any extra premium.
    
- **attributionSumAssured** (string): The sum assured attributed.
    
- **extraPremiRate** (integer): The rate for any extra premium.
    
- **statusDescription** (string): A description of the current status.
    
- **statusId** (string): An identifier for the status.
    
- **healthQuestionFlag** (string): A flag indicating if health questions are required.
    
- **premiumAttribution** (string): Attribution for the premium.
    
- **entryAge** (integer): The entry age of the insured individual.
    
- **standardPremium** (integer): The standard premium amount.
    
- **extraPremium** (string): Any extra premium amount.
    
- **tenure** (integer): The tenure of the insurance policy.
    

This information is essential for understanding the outcome of the insurance premium calculation based on the provided input parameters.
